A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or relevant server/worker logs.

- Book format involved (EPUB/PDF/CBZ/MOBI/AZW3), if relevant:
